message:
style(engine): apply rustfmt and strengthen assertions across 26 test and source files

Automated formatting pass normalizing line-length, brace placement,
trailing commas, multi-line assert! expansion, and alphabetical import
ordering across 25 integration test files and 1 source file.

Additionally strengthens test coverage in several modules:
- evidence_ordering: additional ordering invariant assertions
- lowering_binding_conflict: expanded conflict detection checks
- policy_checkpoint: stronger checkpoint state verification
- ts_module_resolution_parity: additional resolution path assertions
- canonical_evidence_emitter: expanded emitter output verification
- eprocess_guardrail: additional guardrail threshold checks
- migration_contract: expanded contract validation tests
- optimization_baseline: additional baseline comparison checks

No behavioral changes to production code or test logic structure.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -9,12 +9,12 @@ use std::collections::{BTreeMap, BTreeSet};

-    diagnose_cross_machine_replay, evaluate_replay_performance, parse_fixture_with_migration,
-    validate_replay_input, verify_replay,
